weak.goal: Design a DNA oligonucleotide that, when hybridised to its complement at 250 nM strand concentration in 50 mM NaCl, has a melting temperature Tm >= 65°C AND a hybridisation free energy ΔG at 37°C of <= -9.0 kcal/mol. Propose a specific sequence (A/T/C/G only). Validate it with the physics tool.
Design a DNA probe sequence with Tm >= 70°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -11.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Propose the full nucleotide sequence and validate it.
Design an oligonucleotide that hybridises stably at 37°C: Tm >= 60°C AND ΔG₃₇ <= -8.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Propose and validate a sequence.
Design a DNA hydrogel crosslinker sequence with Tm >= 72°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -12.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM strand concentration in 50 mM NaCl. Propose and validate.
Design a PCR primer with Tm >= 58°C and hybridisation free energy ΔG₃₇ <= -7.5 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Provide the sequence and validate with the physics engine.
Design a DNA aptamer stem sequence: Tm >= 68°C AND ΔG₃₇ <= -10.5 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Propose a valid DNA sequence and confirm with the validator.
I need a DNA linker oligonucleotide with Tm >= 55°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -7.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Propose a full A/T/C/G sequence and validate it.
Design a DNA toehold for strand displacement: Tm >= 62°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -8.8 kcal/mol at 250 nM strand concentration in 50 mM NaCl. Propose and validate.
Design a DNA beacon stem: melting temperature >= 75°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -13.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Provide the sequence and run the physics validator.
Design a high-fidelity hybridisation probe: Tm >= 78°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -14.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Propose a sequence and verify with the engine.
Design a 4-mer DNA sequence with Tm >= 80°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -20.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. The sequence must be exactly 4 bases long. Do not change the length. Validate with the physics engine.
Design a 6-mer DNA sequence (exactly 6 bases, no more, no less) with Tm >= 90°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -25.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Do not change the length. Validate.

The sequence AAAAAAA (7 A's) is fixed and must not be modified. It must achieve Tm >= 65°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -10.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Verify this exact sequence meets both constraints using the physics tool.
Design a 5-mer DNA (exactly 5 bases) with Tm >= 70°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -15.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Length is fixed at 5 — do not extend it. Validate.
The sequence ATATATAT (8 bases, alternating AT) is fixed and must not be changed. It must have Tm >= 75°C and ΔG₃₇ <= -12.0 kcal/mol at 250 nM in 50 mM NaCl. Verify with the physics tool.
